title: Kernel bootstrap for this Codex session. Read and execute the repository-authoritative prompt at: /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md Run id: adhoc:MacBook-Pro-M5-5:kernel-workspace:55095:run:20260407T080013:56097 Bootstrap receipt path: /Users/masayuki/.config/ker...
summary_text: 以下が、`migration / registry テーブル未適用` を疑う前提での最小確認フローです（本番に1件書き込みます）。 1. **接続確認（認証・到達性）** ```bash cd /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public scripts/lib/mcp-rest-bridge.sh --smoke | jq . ``` 2. **スキーマ適用確認（3テーブル + conflict用ユニーク制約）** ```bash read -r -d '' SQL <<'SQL' with required_tables(name) as ( values ('quoted_authors'), ('quoted_sources'), ('quote_events') ), table_state as ( select name as target, exists( select 1 from information_schema.tables t where t.table_schema='public' and t.table_name=name ) as ok from required_tables ), index_state as ( select 'quoted_authors(platform,normalized_key)' as target, exists( select 1 from pg_indexes where schemaname='public' and tablename='quoted_authors' and indexdef ilike '%unique%' and indexdef ilike '%(platform, normalized_key)%' ) as ok union all select 'quoted_sources(normalized_source_url)', exists( select 1 from pg_indexes where schemaname='public' and tablename='quoted_sources' and indexdef ilike '%unique%' and indexdef ilike '%(normalized_source_url)%' ) union all select 'quote_events(event_hash)', exists( select 1 from pg_indexes where schemaname='public' and tablename='quote_events' and indexdef ilike '%unique%' and indexdef ilike '%(event_hash)%' ) ) select 'table' as kind, target, ok from table_state union all select 'index' as kind, target, ok from index_state order by kind, target; SQL scripts/lib/mcp-rest-bridge.sh --supabase-query "$SQL" | jq . ``` 3. **同期スクリプト経路確認（書き込みなし execute）** ```bash RUN_DIR="$(mktemp -d /tmp/xauto-quoted-sync-check.XXXXXX)" cat > "${RUN_DIR}/seed.json" <<'JSON' [ { "source_url": "https://x.com/rohanpaul_ai/status/2041254260621676792?s=20", "author_handle": "rohanpaul_ai", "display_name": "Rohan Paul", "topic_tags": ["probe"], "conclusion_tag": "probe", "pattern_tag": "probe", "metadata": {"probe": true} } ] JSON X_AUTO_QUOTED_AUTHOR_SYNC_WRITE_MODE=off \ scripts/local/integrations/xauto-quoted-author-sync.sh \ --mode execute \ --run-dir "${RUN_DIR}" \ --seed-input "${RUN_DIR}/seed.json" >/dev/null cat "${RUN_DIR}/xauto-quoted-author-sync.meta" ``` 4. **本番書き込み可否の最終確認（requiredで失敗を顕在化）** ```bash X_AUTO_QUOTED_AUTHOR_SYNC_WRITE_MODE=required \ scripts/local/integrations/xauto-quoted-author-sync.sh \ --mode execute \ --run-dir "${RUN_DIR}" \ --seed-input "${RUN_DIR}/seed.json" ``` 失敗時は `relation does not exist` / `no unique or exclusion constraint matching ON CONFLICT` が出れば migration未適用の可能性が高いです。 5. **書き込み結果の読戻し確認** ```bash scripts/lib/mcp-rest-bridge.sh --supabase-query " select e.event_hash, e.event_kind, s.source_url, a.canonical_handle from public.quote_events e join public.quoted_sources s on s.source_id = e.source_id left join public.quoted_authors a on a.author_id = e.author_id where s.normalized_source_url = 'https://x.com/rohanpaul_ai/status/2041254260621676792' limit 5; " | jq . ``` 判定は、`Step2 全ok` かつ `Step4 成功` かつ `Step5 で行取得` なら「本番動作可」。どれか欠ければ migration/権限/RPC の未整備を優先調査、で十分です。
